Title: Relates to reimbursement for grants for the hiring of teachers, arts and music teacher grants and nonpublic school safety equipment grants
Summary: Provides that reimbursement payable for grants for the hiring of teachers, arts and music teachers and nonpublic school safety equipment shall be paid within twelve months of the education department's receipt of a complete application for such grant; requires the commissioner of education to report on any such reimbursements payable.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to reimbursement for grants for the hiring of teachers, arts and music teacher grants and nonpublic school safety equipment grants
